trial.Description: Index of each independent stimulation trial (1-based).

anode.Description: Anode electrode label; matches entries in electrodes.tsv.

cathode.Description: Cathode electrode label; matches entries in electrodes.tsv.

pulse_width_us.Description: Pulse width per stimulation pulse, in microseconds (µs).

observed_response.Description: Observed motor, sensory, or behavioral response noted during stimulation.

GeneralNotes.Description: Each stimulation train lasted up to approximately 2 seconds and was terminated immediately upon detection of a motor response or any sign of discomfort. Actual per-trial durations and early terminations were not logged individually.
